## Target

Repository, agent framework, MCP client, or directory:

## Goal

What should the agent be able to do with Satoshi API?

- [ ] Bitcoin fee recommendations
- [ ] Mempool or block data
- [ ] Transaction confirmation/status checks
- [ ] MCP tools via `bitcoin-mcp`
- [ ] x402 paid calls
- [ ] Other:

## Proposed Integration Surface

- [ ] `AGENTS.md`
- [ ] `CLAUDE.md`
- [ ] `.github/copilot-instructions.md`
- [ ] MCP config
- [ ] README/docs
- [ ] Directory/listing submission
